title: Unify dashboard data-grid row actions and registry activity layout

source.subject: fix(dashboard): unify data-grid row actions and registry activity layout

body:
## Outcome

Unify data-grid row actions and registry activity layout.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.
- Contributes to deliverable **api.json primary contract** (`v02-api-json-contract`).

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`f9d2b48`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/f9d2b48) — fix(dashboard): unify data-grid row actions and registry activity layout
